summary: Iteration 4 design overhaul testing completed. Backend APIs 100% passing (4/4 smoke tests). Frontend UI 100% verified (8/8 tests). Major design changes successfully implemented: Dark navy theme (#0F172A) with amber/gold accents (#F59E0B), Launch Kit preview on all hustle cards showing 4 components (Website, Social Posts, Pitch, Branding), Questionnaire 'Other' option with expandable text input, Landing page social proof stats (10,000+ Hustles, $2.5M+ Revenue, 4.9★ Rating), Gold CTA buttons throughout app, Testimonial section. All screens auto-inherit dark theme. Backend generates 12 hustles (5 starter + 7 premium) sorted correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Colors.ts completely rewritten with premium dark navy theme: background #0F172A, surface #1E293B
✓ Gold/amber accent color for CTAs: orangeCTA #F59E0B, matches design spec perfectly
✓ All screens auto-inherit dark theme from Colors.ts - no hardcoded colors
✓ Landing page has social proof stats: 10,000+ Hustles Generated, $2.5M+ Revenue Potential, 4.9★ User Rating
✓ Landing page has testimonial section with quote from Sarah M., Starter Plan
✓ Gold CTA buttons on landing: Google login, Email login, Register all use Colors.gold
✓ Questionnaire has 'Other' option that expands text input (lines 189-208 in questionnaire.tsx)
✓ Questionnaire selected state uses gold border (Colors.gold) and orange background (Colors.orangeLight)
✓ Hustles list shows Launch Kit preview on every card with 4 items: Website, Social Posts, Pitch, Branding
✓ Launch Kit preview uses rocket icon and gold color for title
✓ Backend generates exactly 12 hustles: 5 starter (low income) + 7 premium (high income $1000+)
✓ Hustles sorted correctly: starter first, then premium (line 425 in server.py)
✓ Premium hustles locked for free users with blurred names and 'Unlock' badge
✓ Pricing page shows all 4 tiers with correct prices and Empire plan highlighted
seed_data_creation: Test users created: test_iter4_<timestamp>@hustleai.com, test_phase2_<timestamp>@hustleai.com, test_hustles_check_<timestamp>@hustleai.com. Hustles generated via API for UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 design overhaul fully tested and verified. All visual design changes working perfectly. Dark navy theme (#0F172A) applied consistently across all screens. Gold accent color (#F59E0B) used for all CTAs. Launch Kit preview showing on hustle cards. Questionnaire 'Other' option expandable input working. Social proof and testimonial on landing page. No issues found.

✓ GET /api/hustles - Returns 12 hustles sorted (5 starter unlocked, 7 premium locked for free user)

✓ Registration flow - Works with new user, redirects to questionnaire

✓ Pricing page - Shows all 4 plans: Free, Starter, Pro, Empire

strengths: No backend changes in iteration 4 - all changes were frontend design
Backend APIs continue to work perfectly with 100% pass rate
Hustle generation creates exactly 12 hustles as specified
Sorting logic correctly places starter hustles before premium
All endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id field
Colors.ts completely rewritten with professional dark navy theme
Consistent use of Colors constants throughout all components
No hardcoded colors - all use Colors.ts values
Gold accent color (#F59E0B) used consistently for CTAs
Launch Kit preview cleanly integrated into hustle cards
Questionnaire 'Other' option implementation is clean and functional
Social proof stats and testimonial add credibility to landing page
All interactive elements have testID attributes
Dark theme creates premium feel matching $500/month consulting tool aesthetic

design_quality_assessment.color_scheme: ✓ EXCELLENT - Dark navy (#0F172A) with gold accents (#F59E0B) creates premium, professional look
design_quality_assessment.consistency: ✓ EXCELLENT - All screens use Colors.ts, no color inconsistencies found
design_quality_assessment.accessibility: ✓ GOOD - Gold on dark navy has good contrast, text is readable
design_quality_assessment.mobile_first: ✓ EXCELLENT - All elements sized appropriately for mobile (375x667 viewport)
design_quality_assessment.touch_targets: ✓ GOOD - Buttons are tappable, minimum 44px height maintained
design_quality_assessment.visual_hierarchy: ✓ EXCELLENT - Clear hierarchy with gold CTAs, white primary text, gray secondary text
